description: Follow-up / status check email after interview — stage stays interview, action update_stage
subject: Re: Interview Follow-up — Platform Engineer @ Scale AI
raw_text:
Hi Kirill,

Just following up on your interview last Thursday with our engineering team. We're currently finalising our decision and expect to get back to you by end of this week (Friday, June 12).

In the meantime, feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Best,
Rachel Kim
Recruiter, Scale AI
rachel.kim@scale.ai

expected.note: TRICKY: mentions 'last Thursday' (past call) → has_had_call: true. Response deadline 'by end of this week' = Friday June 12.
